---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)

places_raw <- read_csv(here("data", "PLACES__Local_Data_for_Better_Health,_County_Data,_2025_release_20260709.csv")) %>% 
  clean_names()

opp_insights_1 <- read_csv(here("data", "Table_1_county_trends_estimates.csv")) %>% 
  clean_names()

soc_cap <- read_csv(here("data", "social_capital_zip.csv")) %>% 
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
places_ca <- places_raw %>% 
  filter(state_abbr == "CA") %>% view()

places_tri_county <- places_ca %>% 
  filter(location_name %in% c("Santa Barbara", "Ventura", "San Luis Obispo")) %>% view()

unique(places_tri_county$year)

table(places_tri_county$category)
```

```{r}
opp_ca <- opp_insights_1 %>% 
  filter(state_name == "California") %>% 
  filter(county_name %in% c("Santa Barbara", "San Luis Obispo", "Ventura"))

view(opp_ca)

view(soc_cap)
```
